name: Warm dusty pink dreamy ground in pixel art top-down view, soft pastel mauve-pink powder surface RGB(180,138,140), gentle organic grain texture, faint dust particles scattered, painterly desaturated palette dominated by rose-pink and dusty mauve, NO STONES, NO SLABS, NO BLOCKS, NO FLAGSTONES, smooth flowing ground without hard edges, lineless silhouette, no individual tile shapes, Alabaster Dawn aesthetic, fully walkable flat ground, no elevation, no wall, dreamy magical biome floor, soft pastel mood. ↗ Pale cream-beige dust ground in pixel art top-down view, lighter sand-toned powder RGB(220,200,170) with subtle dust grain, occasional tiny pale flecks, painterly desaturated palette with warm cream and tan tones, NO blue NO cool grey, NO STONES, NO SLABS, NO BLOCKS, smooth flowing ground without hard edges, lineless silhouette, walkable flat ground at exact same elevation as the surrounding pink dust — NO height difference, NO wall, NO raised edge, just gentle texture and color shift, dreamy magical biome variation, soft pastel mood.

pattern_system.description: 4×4 patterns with wildcards for flexible tile matching

pattern_layout.description: 4×4 grid where center 2×2 matches tile corners, outer ring uses wildcards

example.row_1: Wildcard + NW corner + NE corner + Wildcard
example.row_2: Wildcard + SW corner + SE corner + Wildcard

usage.description: Sample 4×4 terrain around tile position, encode as pattern key, lookup in cache
